title: kalinbogatzevski/captain-memo
summary: Local, cross-AI memory for coding agents — Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Antigravity, Cursor, Kimi & more share one private corpus. Hybrid search, auto-injected context, no-API-key summarizers, runs fully local via Ollama.

title: JaydonJP/Mia
summary: JARVIS, but real. A local-first AI assistant for Windows that sees your screen, controls your apps via UI automation, speaks back with neural TTS, and runs on Ollama — with hot-swappable cloud fallback to OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini. Includes a React dashboard with real-time SSE streaming.

title: xxinjie21/Smart-Quiz-Tutor
summary: 智学助手 — Obsidian AI 出题插件，读取本地知识库自动生成试题 + SM-2 间隔重复错题复习 + 考研排版导出，Ollama/OpenAI 双兼容

title: Tencent/WeKnora
summary: Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

title: dyad-sh/dyad
summary: Local, open-source AI app builder for power users ✨ v0 / Lovable / Replit / Bolt alternative 🌟 Star if you like it!

title: DevMando/MandoCode
summary: A .NET C# CLI Coding Agent powered by Ollama + Semantic Kernel and RazorConsole. Run locally or in the cloud. Refactors code, proposes diffs,   and updates your project safely — no API keys required.

title: sharfuddin18/Codemaster-Ai
summary: Codemaster-AI is a powerful, local-first coding assistant designed to live directly within your terminal, ensuring your codebase remains secure and private. By leveraging a modular, agent-based architecture and a local vector engine, it provides context-aware code generation, explanation, and debugging without ever leaving your machine.

title: wlsdks/muse-agent
summary: An AI you live with, not one you visit. A little bluebird settles into your computer — keeps your unfinished threads, learns your rhythms, and gets better at helping the longer you're together. Local-first: your life stays on your machine.

title: netresearch/t3x-nr-llm
summary: The shared AI foundation for TYPO3 — one LLM setup for every extension on your site

title: deepanshu0110/Month10-LangChain-MLflow-Portfolio
summary: Month 10 of a 12-month Data Science program: LangChain agents/chains, MLflow experiment tracking, Ollama on Colab, Evidently drift monitoring, prompt engineering. Days 169-180.

title: MasihMoafi/Elpis
summary: You put an agent into an Elpis, and it becomes Elpis; Be Elpis my friend.

title: NavisualGuide/navisual
summary: AI desktop guide that shows you where to click — it observes, never clicks. Free tier (no sign-up), BYOK or local Ollama, source-available.

title: itxkarthik/cognolith
summary: Cognolith is a self-hosted knowledge workspace for Markdown notes, document ingestion, relationship graphs, hybrid search, and local AI chat. The stack uses Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL with pgvector, and optional Ollama models.

title: paolobets/hiris
summary: HIRIS — Home Intelligent Reasoning & Integration System. AI-powered Home Assistant add-on.

title: pipeshub-ai/pipeshub-ai
summary: PipesHub is an open-source fully extensible AI context layer that unifies your business data for explainable enterprise search and agentic workflow automation.

title: sparkandflash/MSRPEngine
summary: (llm based) ai companion that can text you first.

title: harshadap-pixel/crucible
summary: Reads your codebase, detects your RAG pipeline, and auto-generates the eval tests most likely to break it.

title: daya7781r/miii-cli-offline-coder
summary: Miii-CLI 2026: Zero-Cost Local AI Coding Agent with Ollama – Fully Offline & Private

title: Anirudhx7/ollama-mesh
summary: The control plane for self-hosted AI inference. Warm-state GPU routing, multi-runtime orchestration across Ollama, vLLM, llama.cpp, TGI and MLX . Single Go binary. Apache-2.0.

title: Bike4Mind/bike4mind
summary: The open-core AI workbench — notebooks, agents, RAG, voice, and images across any model: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, or local via Ollama/vLLM. BSL 1.1,  auto-converting to Apache-2.0 on a two-year clock. Your AI keeps running when theirs doesn't.
